title: Onboard Generate — v3 Context Shape
description: Input schema for onboard:generate in onboard 3.x. v3 is the ONLY accepted shape (the v2 external-caller API was removed in 3.0.0). The context is the internal object built by onboard:start (version:3 + analysis + wizardAnswers + an OPTIONAL top-level `research` object, canonical shape: onboard/schemas/research-dossier.json). There is no `phases` block and no inheritance from a v2 schema. v1 and v2 are rejected. NOTE: `research` is OPTIONAL here; generate makes it required for a full generation (and exempt for callerExtras.regenerateOnly re-emits) at runtime — see generate/SKILL.md Step 0.1.

version.description: Schema version. HARD-REQUIRED and the only accepted value. v1 and v2 are rejected.

reResearch.description: v3 re-research marker. Present ONLY on a re-research regen built by onboard:update / onboard:evolve — signals config-generator to run the merge-aware regen path (customization floor + marker surgery + progress-preserving backlog merge). Absent on first onboard and on regenerateOnly snapshot replays. Does NOT change generate Step 0.1 validation.

dimensions.description: the research dimensions refreshed this run (scoped set), or all in-roster dims when escalated

escalatedToFull.description: true when the tiered escalation rule promoted a scoped re-research to full

research.description: Optional synthesized research object. Canonical shape: onboard/schemas/research-dossier.json.
